title: Green Open VSX publish alongside docs site CI

source.subject: ci: green pipelines for docs site, Open VSX publish, and Rust audit

body:
## Outcome

Green pipelines for docs site, Open VSX publish, and Rust audit.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).
- Open VSX matrix includes **darwin-arm64** and **darwin-x64** with cross-built Intel LSP where needed.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`6444332`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6444332) — ci: green pipelines for docs site, Open VSX publish, and Rust audit
